parts.text:
You are a research assistant for a clinical EBM (medicina baseada em evidência) pipeline. Answer this research question with PMID-grade evidence using google_search grounding.

QUESTION: IPD-MA (Individual Patient Data) vs aggregate-level pooled MA: quando IPD é necessário (forças vs fraquezas), custo/tempo/governança, exemplos práticos comparativos onde a conclusão diferiu entre as duas abordagens.
QUESTION_ID: Q2-ipd-vs-aggregate-pathB
DOMAIN_FOCUS: meta-analysis methodology, IPD-MA

REQUIREMENTS (zero-tolerance):
- Cite PMIDs (numeric only, e.g., 12345678) when claiming empirical findings
- List UNVERIFIED PMIDs in candidate_pmids_unverified array — do NOT fabricate; "I do not know" beats fabrication
- Distinguish established literature framing (cite paper, confidence: high) vs paraphrase (confidence: medium)
- Acknowledge gaps explicitly via gaps array
- Output ONLY JSON matching the schema below — NO preamble, NO postamble, NO markdown wrapper

REQUIRED OUTPUT (JSON, schema-strict):
{
  "schema_version": "1.0",
  "produced_at": "<ISO-8601 now>",
  "research_question_id": "Q2-ipd-vs-aggregate-pathB",
  "research_question": "IPD-MA (Individual Patient Data) vs aggregate-level pooled MA: quando IPD é necessário (forças vs fraquezas), custo/tempo/governança, exemplos práticos comparativos onde a conclusão diferiu entre as duas abordagens.",
  "external_brain_used": "gemini-3.1-pro-preview + google_search",
  "codex_cli_version": null,
  "findings": [
    {
      "claim": "<factual claim in 1-2 sentences>",
      "supporting_sources": [
        {"type": "pmid|doi|url|verbatim", "value": "<id>", "verified": false}
      ],
      "confidence": "high|medium|low",
      "convergence_signal": "<alignment | divergence | novel>"
    }
  ],
  "candidate_pmids_unverified": ["12345678", "..."],
  "convergence_flags": [
    {"type": "alignment|divergence|gap", "description": "<short reason>"}
  ],
  "confidence_overall": "high|medium|low",
  "gaps": ["<what you could not answer>"]
}

Quality over quantity (~4-6 findings max). Focus on: (1) when IPD is necessary vs sufficient with aggregate, (2) cost/time/governance overhead, (3) concrete examples where IPD reversed or substantially changed aggregate-level conclusion. Output ONLY the JSON object — no other text.
